message:
Command `# Check current state of the PnR flow
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | head -3
echo "---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -10
echo "---antenna check status---"
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/reports/ 2>/dev/null
cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5
cat /tmp/antenna_check.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Check current state of the PnR flow
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | head -3
echo "---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -10

cat /tmp/antenna_check.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5
